name: Eggnog Parfait Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Whipped cream Candy decorettes
2. Dissolve gelatin in hot water.
3. Cut ice cream into 6 chunks; add to gelatin and stir until melted.
4. Chill mixture until partially set.
5. Add nutmeg and rum flavoring, stirring thoroughly.
6. Stir in egg yolks; fold in egg whites.
7. Pour the mixture into cooled tart shells.
8. Chill until set.
9. Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with candy decorettes.
